response.justification: While the candidate exceeds the 15-year experience requirement and has solid cloud/infrastructure expertise, the role explicitly seeks an AI strategy principal engineer with demonstrated AI expertise. The candidate's background is full-stack web/backend development with no substantive AI/ML work history—the single mention of AI (MCP code generators at current role) is only 2 months old and insufficient to claim recognized AI expertise the role requires.
strengths: 20 years of software engineering experience exceeds the minimum requirement
Proven cloud and infrastructure expertise including AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes
Demonstrated seniority through staff-level roles and founded GISCollective platform
concerns: No demonstrated AI or machine learning expertise; resume shows zero AI-related projects or products
Lacks advanced degree in AI-related field; only holds BS degrees in unrelated fields
Recent AI exposure (2 months at re:cinq) is too nascent to constitute recognized expertise

key_factors.factor: Cloud and infrastructure background partially relevant
